definition.body: present={{ present }} explicit_null={% if explicit_null is none %}NULL{% else %}{{ explicit_null }}{% endif %} missing={% if missing is defined %}{{ missing }}{% else %}ABSENT{% endif %}.
definition.name: flags

missing.description: A field that is absent from the input.

description: The fixed null/undefined/None/absent contract (specs 004/005 FR-003a): explicit null/None marshals to JSON null; an absent field (JS undefined / Python absent) is field-not-present. The template guards each with an `is defined` / null check so the three forms render distinctly and identically across bindings.
